questions.question: Describe the key differences between a Recurrent Neural Network (RNN) and a Long Short-Term Memory (LSTM) network. (5 marks)
Explain the concept of vanishing gradients in RNNs and how LSTM networks address this issue. (5 marks)

A sequence of words is given as input to an RNN: 'This is a test sentence.' The RNN outputs the probability distribution over the next word in the sequence. What type of RNN is typically used for this task and why? (10 marks)
